targets.expr:
label_join(
  dispatcharr_stream_uptime_seconds
  * on(channel_uuid, channel_number) group_left(channel_name, logo_url, state, provider, profile_name, resolution)
      dispatcharr_stream_metadata,
  "provider_full",
  " ",
  "provider",
  "profile_name"
)

label_join(
  dispatcharr_stream_programming{current_subtitle!=""}
  * on(channel_uuid, channel_number) group_left(channel_name, logo_url, state, provider, profile_name, resolution)
      dispatcharr_stream_metadata,
  "program_title_full",
  " - ",
  "current_title",
  "current_subtitle"
)
or
label_join(
  dispatcharr_stream_programming{current_subtitle=""}
  * on(channel_uuid, channel_number) group_left(channel_name, logo_url, state, provider, profile_name, resolution)
      dispatcharr_stream_metadata,
  "program_title_full",
  "",
  "current_title"
)

dispatcharr_stream_current_bitrate_bps
* on(channel_uuid, channel_number) group_left(channel_name, logo_url, state, provider, profile_name, resolution)
    dispatcharr_stream_metadata

dispatcharr_stream_buffering_speed
* on(channel_uuid, channel_number) group_left(channel_name, logo_url, state, provider, profile_name, resolution)
    dispatcharr_stream_metadata

dispatcharr_client_connection_duration_seconds
* on(client_id, channel_uuid) group_left(ip_address)
  dispatcharr_client_info
* on(channel_uuid) group_left(channel_name)
  dispatcharr_stream_metadata

dispatcharr_client_bytes_sent
* on(client_id, channel_uuid) group_left(ip_address)
  dispatcharr_client_info
* on(channel_uuid) group_left(channel_name)
  dispatcharr_stream_metadata

dispatcharr_client_current_transfer_rate_bps
* on(client_id, channel_uuid) group_left(ip_address)
  dispatcharr_client_info
* on(channel_uuid) group_left(channel_name)
  dispatcharr_stream_metadata

dispatcharr_m3u_account_stream_count
* on(account_id, account_name) group_left(account_type, is_active, status)
  dispatcharr_m3u_account_info

dispatcharr_user_active_streams
* on(user_id) group_left(username, user_level, is_staff)
  dispatcharr_user_info
